budgetBakersWalletImport.pageDescription: Import your transactions exported from the Wallet app by BudgetBakers.

steps.uploadDescription: Select your Wallet CSV export file.
steps.previewDescription: Review detected data and configure account mappings.

fileUpload.description: Upload one or more Wallet CSV export files to import transactions. All files must have the same columns.

errors.parseFailed: Failed to parse file. Please check the format and try again.

merge.emptySelection: Select at least one CSV file
merge.headerMismatch: Columns in "{file}" don't match the first file. All files must have the same columns in the same order.
merge.tooManyRows: Selected files total more than {max} rows. Remove some files or rows and try again.
merge.parseError: Couldn't parse "{file}". Make sure it's a valid CSV.

preview.accountsHelper: Configure how each detected account will be handled during import.

accountRow.currentBalanceHint: Leave blank to start from the sum of imported transactions.
accountRow.keepBalanceNote: The existing account's current balance will be preserved. History will be back-filled.

duplicates.title: {count} potential duplicates detected | {count} potential duplicate detected | {count} potential duplicates detected
duplicates.hint: These imported rows closely match existing transactions. Unchecked rows will be skipped.

execute.partialImportNote: Some rows may have already been imported before this failure. Re-importing could create duplicates.

done.successDescription: Your Wallet data has been successfully imported.
done.partialDescription: Some rows were imported successfully, but others encountered errors.
done.allFailedDescription: No rows were imported. Review the errors below and try again.
done.errorsTitle: {count} row(s) failed | {count} row failed | {count} rows failed
done.balanceWarningTitle: Some account balances may be incorrect
done.balanceWarningBody: We couldn't reset the balance on one or more existing accounts after import. Review the affected accounts.

accounts.currentBalancePlaceholder: Leave blank to use imported total

tooltips.mapExactMatchesAccounts: Link every account whose name exactly matches an existing account
tooltips.mapExactMatchesCategories: Link every category whose name exactly matches an existing category
tooltips.createNewForUnmatched: Set all still-unresolved rows to create a new entry
tooltips.reset: Clear all choices and auto-match by name again

review.duplicatesHint: Checked rows will be imported anyway; unchecked duplicates are skipped.

progress.jobExpired: The import job expired or could not be found.
progress.lostContact: Lost contact with the import job.
